summary: Comprehensive UAT testing of production website www.visionary-suite.com completed. All non-admin user-facing pages and features tested successfully. 16 out of 17 features working correctly. One minor route naming issue found: /app/comic-builder returns 404 (correct route is /app/comic-storybook).

issues: CSP violation for Cloudflare beacon script - not blocking functionality but appears in console

routing_issues.issue: Route /app/comic-builder returns 404 - Console shows 'No routes matched location /app/comic-builder'
routing_issues.priority: LOW - Documented URLs in test request were incorrect, actual app navigation works correctly

landing_page.notes: Proper Visionary Suite branding, navigation, CTAs, 4.9/5 rating badge, 5000+ creators badge, stats (5-10s Reel Generation, 30-90s Story Pack, 100 Free Credits, 50K+ Content Created)

login.notes: Email/password login working with test credentials (test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#). Google Sign-in available. Forgot password link present.

dashboard.notes: Shows 'Welcome back, UAT Test User!' with 70 credits. All tool cards displayed: Generate Reel Script, Create Kids Story Pack, Photo to Comic, Comic Story Book Builder, Reaction GIF, Coloring Book, Tone Switcher, Challenge Gen. Daily Reward and Profile links in header.

reel_generator.notes: Topic input field, Niche/Tone/Duration/Language/Goal/Audience dropdowns. Cost: 10 credits per reel. Generate Reel Script button functional.

photo_to_comic.notes: Two modes: Comic Avatar (RECOMMENDED, 3 Steps, From 15 credits) and Comic Strip (POPULAR, 5 Steps, From 25 credits). Content Policy displayed.

reaction_gif_maker.notes: 4-step wizard: Upload → Reaction → Style → Create. Upload area for PNG/JPG/WEBP up to 10MB. Content Policy displayed.

comic_storybook_builder.notes: 5-step wizard: Genre → Story → Length → Add-ons → Generate. 8 story types: Kids Adventure, Superhero, Fantasy, Comedy, Romance, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Spooky Fun. Content Policy displayed.

coloring_book_generator.notes: 5-step wizard: Mode → Content → Customize → Preview → Download. Two modes: Generate From Story (Recommended, 10 credits) and Convert Photos (5 credits). 100% Original Content disclaimer.

billing.notes: Subscription Plans: Weekly (₹199/50), Monthly (₹699/200), Quarterly (₹1999/500, 35% off), Yearly (₹5999/2500, 50% off). Credit Packs: Starter (₹499/100), Creator (₹999/300), Pro (₹2499/1000).

profile.notes: Shows UAT Test User info, Member since 3/5/2026, 0 Total Generations, 70 Credits Balance, Active status. Profile edit form, Change Password section, App Tour replay button.

payment_history.notes: Stats: 0 Total Transactions, 0 Successful Payments, ₹0 Total Spent. Transaction History table (empty for test user). Buy Credits and Manage Subscription CTAs.

pricing.notes: Choose Your Plan page with currency selector (INR/USD/EUR/GBP). Shows all subscription tiers with Subscribe Now buttons.

blog.notes: Creator Tips & Resources page with search, category filters (All Posts, Instagram Tips, YouTube Tips, Content Strategy), 3 articles displayed, sidebar CTA.

reviews.notes: Customer Reviews page with 0.0 rating (0 reviews), Write a Review button, Get Started Free CTA.

contact.notes: Get in Touch page with contact form (Full Name, Email, Subject dropdown, Message), Contact Info (Email: krajapraveen@visionary-suite.com, Phone: Available upon request, Location: Global - Remote First), Response Time info.

privacy_policy.notes: Full privacy policy document. Last Updated: February 19, 2026. Sections: Introduction, Information We Collect, How We Use Your Information.

terms_of_service.notes: Full terms document. Last Updated: February 28, 2026. Sections: Acceptance of Terms, Description of Service, User Accounts, Credits and Payments.

logout.notes: Logout button clears session and redirects to /login page successfully.

action_items: Consider updating documentation to use correct route /app/comic-storybook instead of /app/comic-builder
Consider adding Cloudflare beacon to CSP whitelist to clear console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: All user-facing pages load correctly with proper content
All creator tools (Reel Generator, Photo to Comic, GIF Maker, Comic Builder, Coloring Book) have proper wizards with clear steps
Billing page shows clear pricing with multiple currency support
Profile and Payment History pages display user information correctly
Public pages (Blog, Reviews, Contact, Privacy, Terms) are all functional
CSP console warning for Cloudflare beacon is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 94% (16/17 features passing, 1 minor route documentation issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 121 completed comprehensive UAT on production www.visionary-suite.com. All non-admin pages tested. Key URLs discovered: /app/reels (not /app/reel-generator), /app/gif-maker (not /app/reaction-gif), /app/comic-storybook (not /app/comic-builder). Test user has 70 credits, 0 transactions. All wizard flows accessible. Billing shows INR pricing by default. No API testing needed - this was frontend-only UAT.
